channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Strategy pauses its Bitcoin buying spree to hoard a massive $3 billion cash cushion
item.description: Strategy now has more than 20 months of coverage for preferred-stock dividends and debt interest.

item.title: BitMine Buys $49 Million in Ethereum as Tom Lee Hails Early Robinhood Chain Demand
item.description: According to BitMine Chairman Tom Lee, Ethereum is benefiting from the early success of the Robinhood Chain layer-2 network.

item.title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
item.description: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.

item.title: Bitcoin threatens $62K in risk-asset rout as Donald Trump says US will 'run' closed Hormuz Strait
item.description: Bitcoin bulls faced an uphill struggle to preserve $62,000 as stocks opened down on Strait of Hormuz rhetoric between the US and Iran.

item.title: Bolivia weighs adding Tether's USDT to its national payments system
item.description: Crypto usage has spiked in the country, with transaction volumes hitting $430 million in the year after the central bank removed restrictions in mid-2024.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says "The U.S. Senate should pass the Clarity Act." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE05N09XTlhBb3daejI5SDBKbC1zaTVGX2VmRDJ0WUxfTU93d1hnSFJpbXAzU2dIMVpyU3BWTTNXUGNvekxWS0luMWFTaHhJek55eTA5M3Z0QkdKeTFKLTRVUVhEWk1STTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Tru…

item.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserves to $3 Billion, Skipping Bitcoin Buy for Third Week
item.description: Strategy went another week without buying Bitcoin, focusing instead on lifting its cash reserves to $3 billion via common stock proceeds.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: UK Treasury report on tokenization cites Ripple as convergence model
item.description: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine ether holdings rise to 5.77 million tokens, or 4.8% of total supply
item.description: The company expanded its ETH treasury while Chairman Tom Lee pointed to Robinhood Chain's rapid growth on Ethereum.

item.title: Bank of Thailand Flags Abnormal Stablecoin Trades in 'Grey Economy' Crackdown
item.description: Data analytics flagged stablecoin transfers meant to evade scrutiny, the central bank says, handing the findings to the securities regulator.

item.title: Courtroom-Ready Analytics: How Chainalysis Met the Daubert Standard
item.description: Blockchain tracing tools like Chainalysis Reactor help investigators untangle the financial networks behind illicit activity: fraud, theft, sanctions evasion, cybercrime,… The post Courtroom-Ready Analytics: How Chainalysis Met the Daubert…

item.title: Wall Street transfer agents lobby SEC, warning that third-party tokens pose risks to market integrity
item.description: The Securities Transfer Association, an industry group for transfer agents, said company-authorized tokenization should receive preferential treatment under future rules.

item.title: Coinbase Ventures tops crypto VC list for H1 2026
item.description: Coinbase’s venture capital arm leads 2026 crypto investing even as funding withered and unique investors shied away amid the bear market.

item.title: Strategy sells $467M in MSTR shares, leaves 843,775 BTC stack untouched
item.description: Strategy boosted its US dollar reserve to $3 billion after selling $466.7 million in MSTR shares, while keeping its 843,775 Bitcoin holdings unchanged.

item.title: Robinhood Chain surges into top five by DEX volume: Bernstein
item.description: Robinhood's new blockchain quickly became a top-five network by DEX volume, signaling strong early demand for its tokenized asset platform, the broker said.

item.title: BitMine Buys 27,801 ETH, Holdings Reach 5.77M ETH BitMine said it acquired 27,801 ETH over the past week, lifting total holdings to 5,770,038 ETH, or about 4.8% of Ethereum’s supply, and has staked 4,917,189 ETH. As of July 12, the company also held $ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9raUJacEZVXzVJZDlfOGZkWnRmNjk2ck5mVWJqWEdXdVp5aDJxS3RrZGFtX1ZUWDduQWR0ZlFoNXI0ZkhjamdHdFFONGhENkwwN3NDdDdwdWxaUUhxam00RF9uZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BitMine Buys 27,801 ETH, Holding…

item.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy added $467 million in cash, made no changes to bitcoin holdings
item.description: The company raised the fresh cash via sales of common stock; its USD Reserve now stands at $3 billion.

item.title: Morning Minute: BTC and ETH ETFs Flip Green After Lengthy Outflow Stretch
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs closed their first positive week since May, but a big week ahead will likely determine crypto's near-term fate.

item.title: UK tokenization push could add as much as $44B to annual output by 2035: Report
item.description: The government-backed roadmap calls for the UK’s first digital gilt by early 2027 and seeks to make tokenized bonds usable for trading and borrowing.

item.title: SBI Holdings' blockchain initiative pivots to Solana for tokenization, stablecoin issuance
item.description: The SBI Solana Global joint venture now includes the Solana Foundation, the Swiss organization that oversees the layer-1 network.

item.title: BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley join UK government's tokenization taskforce
item.description: The 54 firm-strong group, which is backed by the City of London Corporation, will spend the next year working on live tokenisation use cases across UK financial markets.

item.title: Bitcoin whale moves $188M for first time in 7 years
item.description: A dormant whale transferred BTC worth $188 million after seven years of holding, adding to the growing ratio of whale transfers to cryptocurrency exchanges.

item.title: Resurgent U.S.-Iran hostilities send bitcoin lower even as ETF flows show demand
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 13, 2026

item.title: Binance June futures volume at $1.6T defies crypto spot trading slump
item.description: Binance futures volume jumped 80% in June, to $1.61 trillion, outpacing rivals while broader crypto trading activity remained weak.

item.title: BTC price bull market to begin in September? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin price analysis called for the end of the bear market within three months as the US-Iran war sent BTC lower from strengthening $64,000 resistance.

item.title: Chinese Prosecutors Float Treating Crypto Mixer, Privacy Coin Use as Sign of Money Laundering
item.description: An article in the top prosecutors' paper urges new blockchain evidence rules, presumptions of intent, and a state platform to sell seized coins.

item.title: Profit-taking, MidEast hostilities drag crypto lower after bullish week
item.description: Crypto's weekend gains gave way to a Monday selloff as Middle East tensions resurfaced, South Korea's Kospi lost 9.2% and $253 million in leveraged positions were wiped out.

item.title: Japan’s SBI to launch yen stablecoin lending with 3% yield
item.description: SBI VC Trade will open JPYSC lending applications on July 16, offering an initial 3% annual rate for a 12-week term without deposit insurance.

item.title: Paradigm shifts vs bubbles: AI chips and bitcoin show powerful trends can still produce severe corrections
item.description: Structural change can create lasting opportunities, but explosive rallies in semiconductors, metals and bitcoin show how quickly strong narratives can become speculative excess.

item.title: bitcoin:native recovered toward $64K, but weak spot participation and subdued on-chain activity suggest the move lacks broad conviction. Institutions are returning, while options remain defensive. Read this week’s Market Pulse👇 glassno.de/3RxpzMD - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE94dV93Z1pTZEpDUjk2N3FXYmZ6MnV2VF9HRlZUd3MzY3ZZZkxSaFhlUFpCS0lfNkFXSGF2eTRlYkkyV0c2VnV4bzFCa3EzTm92RThMUmdfTlVhX2hRVVNn?oc=5" target="_blank">bitcoin:native recovered toward $64K, …

item.title: Japan stablecoin payments advance with Lawson trial, Netstars launch
item.description: Lawson will test yen stablecoin payments in Tokyo as Netstars launches a merchant service supporting USDC, USDT and JPYC.

item.title: U.S. inflation, second-quarter earnings reports: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting July 13.

item.title: JUST IN: Japanese Financial Giant SBI Teams Up With Solana to Expand Onchain Finance Japanese financial giant SBI Holdings and Solana Foundation announced a strategic partnership to develop Japan-originated onchain financial markets. As part of the - x.com

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin slips below $63,000 as Korea's Kospi plunges 9% overnight
item.description: The liquidations were minor, running at about a sixth of what the market saw at its worst over the past 30 days, per CoinGlass.

item.title: In Bitcoin, influence is earned through work, not ambition. Those who contribute money, utility, and power to the network shape its future. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBjR1dkY191V3hnWV9uNlpPMkZuMmR6N3VQZF9IMXVnZkNZaG9HZTZRQzZCWXY4R3ZDbTZIT1lpakhidkNJcFZsVEV4Zl91ZDN5XzVHQUZ0TkVObDg?oc=5" target="_blank">In Bitcoin, influence is earned through wor…

item.title: ⏰ Upcoming Token Unlocks (July 13 - July 19） Several crypto projects will unlock tokens this week, including $XCN, $STRK, $SEI, $ARB, $DBR, $ZK Investors, keep an eye on these token unlocks events! - x.com

item.title: AI microbusinesses could drive $262B in stablecoin volume by 2033: Swyftx
item.description: The AI-native cohort of the expanding gig economy could increasingly use stablecoins to avoid slow and expensive traditional payment rails, Australian crypto exchange Swyftx said.

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $63,800 as war-driven selloff hits everything but crypto
item.description: Gold, oil, stocks and bonds all moved sharply on the fourth round of U.S. strikes on Iran, but bitcoin is little-changed.

item.title: Bank of Thailand targets USDT and cash flows in gray money crackdown
item.description: Thailand has been plagued by Chinese-affiliated scam centers, with illicit gains flowing through a “gray money” economy.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $197 Million in Weekly Net Inflows, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streak From July 6 to 10 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $197 million in net inflows, ending an eight-week outflow streak. Spot Ethereum ETFs saw $84.42 million i - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs draw $197M, snap 8-week outflow streak
item.description: Analysts are not yet ready to call it a recovery in institutional demand for Bitcoin.

item.title: 🇵🇰 REGULATION: Pakistan's crypto regulator called for dialogue after Islamic scholars ruled against using crypto for payments. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5WMmNuTTgwYjUzbHowbWhYaHB6UFo5ZXdkWnRwcHltdWFkR01QZzFfS3RWMEVmUXB4cGg3LUxZMHZQdUlyeEtTS2tqR05iVjBlLUtRT2ZWOUloQWVpZ1B2aHZzM3o?oc=5" target="_blank">🇵🇰 REGULATION: Pakistan's cry…

item.title: Robinhood L2 sparks ETH optimism, Saylor 'muddies waters.' Hodler's Digest, July 5-12, 2026
item.description: Even Ethereum's critics say Robinhood Chain is bullish for ETH. Nigel Farage and US President Donald Trump become embroiled in crypto related scandals, and more.

item.title: Tom Lee: Why Ethereum Could Become a $5 Trillion Network On July 7, 2026, Tom Lee @fundstrat stated in an interview with the New Era Finance Podcast that at its current valuation of around $300 billion, Ethereum is grossly undervalued. As traditional ass - x.com

item.title: Signs of life?: State of Crypto
item.description: Several sources told CoinDesk that a new draft of the Clarity Act may drop this week, but challenges remain.

item.title: Strategy's Saylor needs clarity in BTC pivot message to convince investors: StanChart
item.description: Standard Chartered sees communication challenges facing the biggest digital asset treasury company as "muddying the waters" for Bitcoin in the near term.

item.title: #Ethereum looks more bullish than #Bitcoin at this point. I expect to see this one continue to break upwards and to run all the way towards $2,400+ to reverse the trend. This period reminds me of the period we've witnessed in June of '25, just before the big bre - x.com

item.title: How to Make Product Ads With AI for TikTok and YouTube—For (Almost) Free
item.description: One product photo, three AI tools, and about 20 minutes: Here's the full workflow for generating a sales video without a camera, a model, or a studio.

item.title: Say hello to Robinhood Chain mainnet, the blockchain built specifically for financial services and tokenized real-world assets. 📺 x.com/i/broadcasts/1… - x.com

item.title: Stablecoin market cap has shrunk by $10 billion since May, but analyst sees no reason to panic
item.description: The market shrank by $7.7 billion in June alone, the largest dollar amount since May 2022's Terra-Luna crash, but stablecoins will likely resume their long-term growth, one analyst said.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at another Bitcoin announcement tomorrow 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFB1QXlGdzlPVVo4WGZ3elFCWldhM1VyUml2LWNXd1NBTlZoM2NzdTdEUGhkOGZXbkpxVFY5djh5UThmaExwMFZOQV9sXy1aLXJQZlFiOUdFc0E3ejZ3QlhjVmVHUk43djQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: Pakistan crypto chief seeks dialogue after scholar rules against crypto payments
item.description: Pakistan’s virtual-assets regulator called for continued dialogue on the treatment of digital assets after meeting an Islamic scholar who backed a ruling against purchases made with crypto.

item.title: Bitcoin is nearing a power law support line Fidelity has tracked since 2015
item.description: The group's Dir. of Global Macro Jurien Timmer calls it an accumulation zone but notes the lack of a catalyst to bounce yet.

item.title: Bitcoin is an emergent network of wallets weighted by satoshis, nodes weighted by commerce, and miners weighted by hashrate, with capital, consensus, and security held in dynamic equilibrium. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBkMHhNZXNVQ0xjZFF3eTJtZ1NWWkhRTmRXT09tS0xkMmhNa182M1JrN21TNjZrVXNMT3FsR2xTc1h3TF8xWjBtMkRMMkRGM0N4YW5vWTcxdy1WSGc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is an emergent network of wallets w…

item.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near lower end of PoS energy intensity
item.description: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the proof-of-stake networks studied.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether little changed as U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes
item.description: The U.S. hit Iran for the third time this week and Tehran has reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz again.
